mapper.insert: INSERT INTO APP_PET (PET_ID, MEMBER_ID, PET_NAME, ANIMAL_ID, SUB_ANIMAL_ID, GENDER, BIRTH_DATE, WEIGHT, IMAGE_URL, REG_NUMBER) VALUES (SEQ_APP_PET.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{petName}, #{animalId}, #{subAnimalId}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{weight}, #{imageUrl}, #{regNumber})
mapper.select: SELECT P.PET_ID AS petId, P.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, P.PET_NAME AS petName, P.ANIMAL_ID AS animalId, P.SUB_ANIMAL_ID AS subAnimalId, P.GENDER AS gender, P.BIRTH_DATE AS birthDate, P.WEIGHT AS weight, P.IMAGE_URL AS imageUrl, P.REG_NUMBER AS regNumber, A1.ANIMAL_NAME AS animalName, A2.ANIMAL_NAME AS subAnimalName, (TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY')) - TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(P.BIRTH_DATE, 1, 4))) AS age FROM APP_PET P JOIN ANIMAL_TYPE A1 ON P.ANIMAL_ID = A1.ANIMAL_ID JOIN ANIMAL_TYPE A2 ON P.SUB_ANIMAL_ID = A2.ANIMAL_ID WHERE P.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY P.PET_ID ASC
